items.definition_en: A baby is a very young child.
items.example_en: The baby is sleeping in her crib.

items.definition_en: A child is a young person who is not yet an adult.
items.example_en: The child is playing in the garden.

items.definition_en: A teenager is a person who is between 13 and 19 years old.
items.example_en: The teenager enjoys listening to music.

items.definition_en: An adult is a person who is fully grown.
items.example_en: Every adult needs an identification card.

items.definition_en: A toddler is a young child who is just beginning to walk.
items.example_en: Her toddler loves to run around the house.

items.definition_en: A preschooler is a child who is not yet old enough for school.
items.example_en: The preschooler painted a picture at home.

items.definition_en: A grandparent is the parent of your parent.
items.example_en: My grandparent tells wonderful stories.

items.definition_en: An elder is an older person in a family or group.
items.example_en: The community respects its elder.

items.definition_en: An infant is a baby who is very young.
items.example_en: The infant smiled at his mother.

items.definition_en: A pensioner is someone who has retired from work.
items.example_en: The pensioner goes for a walk every morning.

items.definition_en: A newborn is a baby that has just been born.
items.example_en: The newborn slept peacefully.

items.definition_en: An adolescent is a young person who is developing into an adult.
items.example_en: The adolescent is learning more about himself.

items.definition_en: A middle-aged person is someone between young and old age.
items.example_en: The middle-aged person enjoys jogging in the park.

items.definition_en: A young adult is a person in their late teens or early twenties.
items.example_en: He is a young adult starting his first job.

items.definition_en: A twin is one of two siblings born at the same time.
items.example_en: Each twin has their own personality.

items.definition_en: An orphan is a child whose parents have died.
items.example_en: The orphan found a new family.

items.definition_en: A senior citizen is an older adult, usually over sixty.
items.example_en: A senior citizen can get discounts at the cinema.

items.definition_en: A minor is a person who is not legally an adult.
items.example_en: A minor must go to school.

items.definition_en: A widow is a woman whose husband has died.
items.example_en: The widow lives with her daughter.

items.definition_en: A widower is a man whose wife has died.
items.example_en: The widower visits the park each day.
